name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Ceheckout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3

      - name: Set up Pyhton
        uses: actions/setup-python@v4
        with:
          python-version: '3.8'

      - name: Install Dependencies
        run: |
          python -m venv venv
          source venv/bin/activate
          pip install -r requirements.txt
          
      - name: Run static code analisys with flake 8
        run: |
          source venv/bin/activate
          flake8 my_app/main_v1.py

      - name: Run static code analisys with mypy
        run: |
          source venv/bin/activate
          mypy my_app --config-file mypy.ini
